title: 貴方のこぶしが名残に揺れて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way back from an outing with Meisho
Doto until we spot Haru Urara by the riverbank.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: La-la-laa! La-di-daa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, Doto! On your way home?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, I am, but... Urara, is that... shadowboxing
you're doing?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: No! I'm practicing my singing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
My singing instructor said the song should pack
more of a punch, so I'm working on that!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
A different punch? You mean there's more than
one type?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... I think your instructor was asking for...
more punch in your voice rather... than your fists.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so you can tell what kind of punch it is,
Doto! Show me how to do it, pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh! You want m-me to?! I don't think my voice
will serve as a good example!
choice_data_list: Singing just one line wouldn't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I'm not so confident with my singing,
though... Well, if you're okay with enka, then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'd be happy to sing something for you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Where toooo? You say you will never...
retuuurn! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that was amazing! Just like the singers in
kimono on TV!
choice_data_list: Even a heartfelt ballad can pack a punch.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So that's what you mean by "punch." I'm starting
to understand!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All righty, I've almost got this! Doto, sing with me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Where toooo? You say you will never...
retuuurn! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
WHERE TOOOO? YOU SAY YOU'LL NEVER
RETURN! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hm? Why does mine feel a little different?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-well, you certainly are projecting enough... but
I th-think you're missing a little vibrato... maybe...
Umm...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh... vibrato? Vibrato, vibrato... Like, bravo?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No, um, don't overthink it... It's m-more like...
open yourself up and sing more freely!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Your voice has a lot of power to it, Urara... and
it's f-full of energy!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Also, you're very honest... and hardworking, so I
know you'll get the hang of it with a few more
tries!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Woooow! Are you complimenting me?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eep! I'm s-sorry! It's not like my opinion matters!
I'm so sorry if I came off uppity!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hee hee... Yippee! I'm gonna nail this vibrato
punch thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto continues singing together with
Haru Urara, giving her advice along the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, Haru Urara notices a change in her
voice!

text_block_list.name: Doto and Urara
text_block_list.text:
Where toooo? You say you will never...
retuuurn! ♪
choice_data_list: Whoa... that's what I call punch!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yay! I did it! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to you, Doto! You helped me
practice and praised me a lot!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I d-didn't do anything but sing a song!
choice_data_list:
You should be proud. It's okay to hold your
head high.

You should be proud. It's okay to hold your
head high.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I d-didn't do anything but sing a song!
choice_data_list:
You should be proud. It's okay to hold your
head high.

You should be proud. It's okay to hold your
head high.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Th-this is so embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... it f-f-felt really good to sing... It might be
kind of fun... maybe.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Singing is a whole lot of fun! Let's sing all the way
home, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, o-okay! If you don't mind my voice, then
sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the haze of approaching dusk, two voices echo
by the riverbank—strong and unyielding, yet a
little forlorn.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waagh?! I shouldn't be s-so shameless!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Really? But there's so much to like about you,
Doto!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You're kind and you're good at singing! And
that's not everything!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huuuh?! Well, that goes for you as well, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're always so cheerful, and you bothered to
befriend someone like me. You're... very, very
likable!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two exchange compliments the whole way
back to the dorm, with Meisho Doto's face
turning a very bright red.
